name: Woodford Green Athletics Track
metaTitle: Woodford Green Athletics Track | Facility Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Woodford Green athletics track at Ashton Playing Fields.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Opening times vary; the track is used by clubs and schools. Please check the Vision RCL timetable for specific public session availability.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: The facility offers pay-as-you-go access and annual memberships. Contact the centre for current pay-and-play rates.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An 8-lane 400m synthetic track with full field event facilities including jumping pits and throwing circles.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: On-site parking is available for centre users. Be aware of potential restrictions during major athletic events or club meets.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Ashton Playing Fields, 598 Chigwell Road, Woodford Green, IG8 8AA

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Vision RCL page for Ashton Playing Fields for timetables and booking information.
